title: PromptCompanion Prompt Record
description: A single curated AI prompt. One JSON object per line in data/prompts/<category>.jsonl.

title.description: Short human-readable label shown in the prompt list.

body.description: The prompt text itself. Markdown allowed. May contain {{variable}} placeholders.

role.description: How the prompt should be sent to the model. Defaults to 'user' unless explicitly a system prompt.

category.description: Single top-level category bucket. See data/taxonomy.json.

tags.description: Cross-cutting labels. Free-form but prefer vocabulary in data/taxonomy.json.

variables.description: Named {{variable}} placeholders parsed from the body.

target_models.description: Model IDs this prompt is known to work with. Use 'any' if model-agnostic.

source.description: URL of the upstream source (repo, website, etc).

author.description: Attribution string for the original prompt author.

license.description: SPDX identifier of the per-record license. Only CC0-1.0 and MIT are currently bundled.

tested_with.description: Free-text notes on models the prompt has been verified against.

version.description: Record version. Bumped on curation edits.

created.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first import.

updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of most recent edit.

quality.description: Optional curator quality score (0-100). Reserved for v0.1.x.

deprecated.description: Marked true when a prompt is outdated or superseded but preserved for history.

notes.description: Curator notes (why this is useful, caveats, known failure modes).
